Headline: #81 Lawrence Temporary Westbound Reroute near Lawrence/Damen
ShortDescription: Westbound 81 Lawrence  buses are temporarily rerouted via Lawrence, Damen, Foster, Western and Lawrence: due to, street blockage near Lawrence/Damen.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound# 81 Lawrence  buses are temporarily rerouted via Lawrence, Damen, Foster, Western and Lawrence: due to, street blockage near Lawrence/Damen.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Green Line Service Delayed near King Drive
ShortDescription: Green Line trains are standing near King Drive due to signal problems. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green Line trains are standing near King Drive due to signal problems.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
